title: Rapper 6ix9ine officially retires from music, shifts focus to streaming
summary_full: Rapper 6ix9ine, also known as Daniel Hernandez, has announced his retirement from the music industry, declaring it "washed up." He revealed this decision during a livestream with Adin Ross, stating his intention to focus entirely on streaming. This unexpected move has garnered mixed reactions from fans, with some supporting his new venture and others expressing disappointment.
